description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, showing signs of wear and surface grime. The extinguisher features a prominent black discharge nozzle attached to a metallic hose, which is connected to the valve assembly at the top. The valve assembly includes a red lever handle and a metallic safety pin with a ring, both situated at the top for easy access. A large white label with red and white text and pictograms is affixed to the front, providing instructions and safety information. The surface is mostly matte with some areas of visible scuffing and dirt, indicating frequent handling or exposure to urban environments. The overall construction appears robust, with the main body likely made of metal and the nozzle of a durable plastic or composite material.
description: A worn red fire extinguisher with a black nozzle, red handle, and a large instructional label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black nozzle directly facing forward, with the red handle and safety pin visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large white instructional label, the black nozzle extending to the left, and the red handle and valve assembly at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the extinguisher, with the label partially visible and the handle and safety pin at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black nozzle extending to the right, with the red handle and valve assembly clearly visible.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white and red instructional label with text and pictograms on the front side of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A rigid black nozzle is attached to the valve assembly, extending outward and angled slightly downward.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin with a circular pull ring is visible at the top, inserted through the handle.
